booking.parkFeeNotice: Reservation fees do not include park entrance — 30 EGP/person regular days, 50 EGP/person on holidays and festivals.
booking.cancellationNotice: To cancel or reschedule, please call us at least 6 hours before your slot.

games.parkWarning: ⚠️ Reservation fees do not include park entrance tickets — 30 EGP/person on regular days · 50 EGP/person on holidays and festivals

howItWorks.step1Desc: Select either Laser Tag or Gel Blasters for your session.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Find a convenient available time in our calendar.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Fill your details and verify your phone number via SMS.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Receive your booking code and PDF ticket instantly.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Use our online booking system — choose your game, pick a time slot, fill in your info, verify your phone number, and receive your booking code instantly.
faq.a2: Yes, but cancellations must be made at least 6 hours before your slot. Please call us directly to cancel.
faq.a3: No. Park entrance is 30 EGP/person on regular days and 50 EGP/person on holidays and festivals. This is separate from your game reservation fee.
faq.q4: What is the maximum number of players?
faq.q5: Do I need to create an account?
faq.a5: No account needed. Just fill in your name, phone number, and email to book.
faq.a6: Laser Tag (30 min or 1 hour) and Gel Blasters (30 min only).

blog.empty: No posts yet — check back soon!

wizard.dateSelectionHeading: When do you want to play?
wizard.cancelPolicy: Cancellations must be made at least 6 hours before your session.
wizard.slotTakenError: This slot was just taken by someone else. Please go back and choose another time.
